eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Pitkin; Eagle; Garfield, CO; at 8:03 AM on JUN 11, 2026 Effective until 9:03 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test only. If this were a real emergency instructions would follow and all updates found at pitkinemergency.com. Sign up for Pitkin Alerts at pitkinalert.org and all translated messages on the Reachwell app.
